name: ExtensionTerminologyCapabilities_CodeSystem_Content
title: R5: not-present | example | fragment | complete | supplement (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `TerminologyCapabilities.codeSystem.content` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`TerminologyCapabilities.codeSystem.content` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `TerminologyCapabilities.codeSystem.content` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `TerminologyCapabilities.codeSystem.content` has a context of TerminologyCapabilities.codeSystem based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `TerminologyCapabilities`.
Element `TerminologyCapabilities.codeSystem.content` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: not-present | example | fragment | complete | supplement (new)

element.definition: The extent of the content of the code system (the concepts and codes it defines) are represented in this resource instance.

binding.description: The extent of the content of the code system (the concepts and codes it defines) are represented in a code system resource.
